notes.3306: MySQL — should be behind firewall or VPN
notes.5432: PostgreSQL — should be behind firewall or VPN
notes.6379: Redis — no auth by default, extremely dangerous if public
notes.27017: MongoDB — no auth by default, extremely dangerous if public
notes.11211: Memcached — no auth, DDoS amplification risk
notes.2375: Docker API — unauthenticated = full host compromise
